title: Budget Discussion
content: Customer requested a discount on the Enterprise plan. Budget around ₹2,00,000.

title: Follow-up Details
content: Call after the weekend. Customer requested a callback after 6 PM.

title: Decision Maker Info
content: Decision maker is the CEO. Rahul is evaluating the technical parameters first.

title: Plan Preference
content: Highly interested in the Premium Plan, but needs additional custom API integrations for WhatsApp automation.

title: Initial Call Notes
content: Left a voicemail. Will retry tomorrow morning.

title: LinkedIn Inbound Context
content: Downloaded cloud scale datasheet. Focus area: scalability and cloud databases.

title: WhatsApp Query
content: Asked about multi-agent support for their support center. Budget is tight.

title: Video Demo Feedback
content: Sent YouTube demo link. Emily replied saying she loved the interface design.

title: Closing Details
content: Contract signed and registered. Ready to onboard next week.

title: Lost Deal Reason
content: Sticking with competitor. Competitor offered a 3-year price lock. We cannot match that currently.

title: Google Ads Intent
content: Searched for 'AI CRM integration'. Small business profile.

title: Technical Requirements
content: Requires integration with Slack and Jira. Sent docs links.

title: Online Checkout Info
content: Self-serve customer. Onboarding questionnaire completed automatically.

title: Lead Qualification Details
content: BANT analysis: Budget ₹5,00,000, Authority yes, Need yes, Timeline Q3.

title: Won Notes
content: Onboarded. Setup scheduled for tomorrow at 11 AM.

title: Support Call Info
content: Inquired about call logs and dialer integrations. Pointed to caller plugin specs.

title: Enterprise Evaluation
content: Undergoing extensive legal compliance check. Needs ISO certificate copies.

title: Won Notes - Setup
content: Ready to launch workspace. Customer support is on standby.

title: Proposal Review Feedback
content: Lionel liked the volume pricing discounts. Contract drafting in progress.

title: Lost Reasons
content: Too custom. SpaceX requires a fully custom offline on-premise installation, which we do not offer.
